title: NullProtocol
description: The Born-null threshold record for one promotion-gate statistic (spec 12.8: scoring rules measure, deriveNull decides). No promotion gate may compare a statistic to a hand-set constant; every threshold traces back to one of these records, naming the exact perturbation of the actual data it was derived from.

null_protocol.description: Free-form description of the perturbation used to build the null distribution (e.g. shuffled sequence, random equal-size grouping, resampled boundary). Required for audit per spec 12.8; null only when the gate has not yet been evaluated.
